properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 68/14
BARENTS SEA
1. THE SEISMIC VESSEL GECO EAGLE CALL SIGN HP 9513  IS CONDUCTINING SEISIMIC SURVEY IN AREAS BOUNDED BY:

SEISMIC OPERATIONS AREA:
A  74-15N 021-25E
B  74-15N 024-35E
C  73-57N 021-13E
D  73-57N 024-04E

2. GECO EAGLE IS TOWING 12 SEISMIC STREAMERS 4 NM IN LENGTH. ALL SHIPS ARE REQUESTED TO GIVE A WIDE BERTH OF 6 NM CPA.
GECO EAGLE IS MONITORING VHF CH. 16 AND 71.
